name: scaffold-service
description: Bootstrap a new Forge service from an approved repo template — handles repo creation, OpenSpec link and CI baseline.
body:
# scaffold-service

This skill orchestrates the golden-path onboarding for a new Forge service.

## When to use

When the developer asks to start a new microservice / agent runtime / MCP server inside an existing Workspace, and an approved repo template applies.

## How it works

1. Resolve the active Workspace and OpenSpec the new service implements (ask the user if ambiguous).
2. Use `mcp:openspec.get` to validate the spec is `approved` and lifecycle is OK.
3. Use `mcp:github.create_repo` (with the requested template id) to provision the repo.
4. Use `mcp:github.set_branch_protection` to apply Workspace defaults.
5. Print the onboarding URL the developer should follow up at.

## Output

A short status block with the created repo URL, the linked OpenSpec id, and the onboarding request id.
